seed_instruction: Share your thoughts on the quality of your gym’s facilities.
org_constraint: Include specific details about the gym’s layout.
new_constraint: Exclude any mention of the gym’s layout.
instruction: Share your thoughts on the quality of your gym’s facilities. Include specific details about the gym’s layout. Exclude any mention of the gym’s layout.
response:
I don't have personal experiences or physical access to any specific gym, so I cannot share thoughts on the quality of facilities or describe a layout. As an AI, I exist in a digital space and do not visit physical locations.

However, I can help you draft a review, analyze gym features based on general data, or provide tips on what makes a gym facility high-quality if you'd like to explore those topics!
